channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Australian marine biobanks aim to conserve threatened species and restore ecosystems
item.description: Across Australia, marine biobanks are emerging as vital tools to protect threatened ocean species and support ecosystem restoration. At Deakin University’s Queenscliff marine research centre, scientis...

item.title: Murang'a Governor Kang'ata Comments on His Political Plans After Leaving UDA
item.description: Murang'a governor Irungu Kang'ata has addressed recent reports suggesting he might be joining former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua’s Democracy for the Citizens Party (DCP) after leaving President ...

item.title: Life in Balmain: A gentrifying peninsula that still feels like a genuine community
item.description: In this opinion piece, broadcaster and writer Chris Taylor reflects on his life in Balmain, a Sydney Harbour peninsula suburb. Although not born there, he feels a deep sense of homecoming when returni...

item.title: NDIS Funding Cuts Force Changes Across Allied Health Services
item.description: Australia's allied health sector, particularly early intervention services for autistic children, is facing a major restructuring due to significant reductions in NDIS funding. AEIOU Foundation, a lon...

item.title: Amigo Resources Identifies Nine Gold Prospect Areas in Lake Victoria Using AI Technology
item.description: A company listed on the London Stock Exchange called Amigo Resources PLC has finished an AI-assisted exploration programme in Tanzania's Lake Zone and identified nine promising areas for gold mining l...

item.title: UDF Leading in All 14 Constituencies of Ernakulam District in Kerala Assembly Elections 2026
item.description: In the Kerala Assembly Elections 2026, the United Democratic Front (UDF) is poised for a strong performance in the Ernakulam district. As per the latest updates, UDF candidates are leading in all 14 a...

item.title: How Reliable Cars Stay Popular Over Time
item.description: For plenty people wey dey buy car, wetin matter pass flashy design or latest technology na whether the car go last long and perform well every day. Dis article talk say cars wey people dey trust for r...

item.title: Clash at Barrackpore counting centre during West Bengal elections leads to police intervention
item.description: During the counting of votes for the 2026 West Bengal assembly elections, a scuffle broke out at the Rastraguru Surendranath College counting centre in Barrackpore, North 24 Parganas district. Securit...

item.title: Ruto Congratulates Charles Kanjama on Becoming LSK President
item.description: President William Ruto has congratulated Charles Kanjama on his election as the new President of the Law Society of Kenya (LSK). During a swearing-in ceremony for 37 judges at State House, Nairobi, Ru...

item.title: Ali Pate Steps Aside From 2027 Bauchi Governorship Contest, Pledges Support for APC
item.description: The Coordinating Minister of Health and Social Welfare, Ali Pate, don announce say e no go run for Bauchi State governorship in 2027, even though supporters don dey beg am make e contest. For one 10-m...

item.title: Analyzing the Value of the Chase Sapphire Reserve Card Despite Its $795 Annual Fee
item.description: Alberto Riva, a senior editor at CNN Underscored, explains why he continues to use the Chase Sapphire Reserve® credit card despite its recent annual fee increase from $550 to $795. Riva values the car...

item.title: Philippine Embassy in France respects France’s sovereignty, cannot intervene in local matters
item.description: The Philippine Embassy in France has clarified its position regarding issues involving the host nation, emphasizing that it cannot take actions that would infringe on France's sovereignty. This statem...

item.title: Renovating a Dumfries flat unearths fascinating 1940s artefacts
item.description: Kirsty Geddes, who purchased her flat in Dumfries last August, uncovered a hidden historical treasure while renovating the top-floor apartment. Working alongside local joiner Jordan Walters, she disco...

item.title: PSX Gains 950 Points Amid Global Oil and Geopolitical Developments
item.description: On Monday, the Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) saw a notable recovery as the KSE-100 index gained 954.77 points, closing at 163,948.94 from the previous day’s 162,994.17. The day started positively with...

item.title: Rigathi Gachagua Announces Plan to Seek Opposition Presidential Nomination in 2027
item.description: Former Deputy President and DCP leader Rigathi Gachagua has officially announced his intention to vie for the opposition's presidential ticket in the 2027 General Election under the United Alternative...

item.title: Man arrested after fatally stabbing a woman in Barcelona suburb
item.description: A man was arrested on Saturday after allegedly stabbing a woman to death in Esplugues de Llobregat, a suburb of Barcelona near the Nou Camp stadium. The incident occurred around 11am in a residential ...

item.title: Selestine Nyagah Appointed as New Rauka Presenter on Citizen TV
item.description: Citizen TV’s gospel programme Rauka is on a new journey as Selestine Nyagah steps in as the show’s new host, taking over from Joyce Omondi. Nyagah, who is an actress, entrepreneur, and social media in...

item.title: Former Boxer Conjestina Achieng Seen on Streets After Rehab, Claims Lack of Support
item.description: Former Kenyan boxing champion Conjestina Achieng has once again sparked concern among Kenyans after being seen on the streets months following her rehabilitation. Conjestina, who had been receiving tr...
